steps.title: Read Michael's sarcasm
steps.content: Owen predicts rain and complains that rain often follows him. Michael replies that if rain did not come, Owen would carry a leaky pail on his head just to have a reason to complain.

steps.title: Separate complaint from weather
steps.content: Choice A focuses on whether Michael knows about rain. Choice B invents Owen helping with hay. Choice C treats Michael's remark as a judgment about weather prediction, but the leaky-pail image is about inventing complaints. Michael believes Owen finds fault with any situation. The answer is D.
